title: Pool Volume Calculator - Calculate Swimming Pool Gallons
description: Free pool volume calculator. Calculate the water volume of rectangular, circular, and oval swimming pools in gallons and liters.
keywords: pool volume calculator, swimming pool gallons, pool water calculator, pool capacity
intro: Calculate the water volume of your swimming pool. Supports rectangular, circular, and oval pool shapes.

faq.a: Rectangular: Length × Width × Average Depth × 7.48 (for gallons). Circular: π × radius² × depth × 7.48. Use average depth for sloped bottoms.

faq.q: How many gallons in a typical pool?
faq.a: A 12×24 ft pool with 5 ft average depth holds about 10,800 gallons. An 18×36 ft pool holds about 24,300 gallons.
